title: Shivparvatia ciliolata
intro: Shivparvatia ciliolata, also known as Himalayan snake root, is a medicinal plant species native to the Himalayan region. It has been traditionally used to treat various health conditions, including fever, rheumatism, and digestive issues, due to its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The bioactive constituents of Shivparvatia ciliolata include flavonoids, alkaloids, and terpenoids, which contribute to its medicinal properties. Shivparvatia ciliolata is commonly prepared as a decoction, powder, or oil in traditional Ayurvedic medicine and Unani medicine for its therapeutic uses.
